prompt: A highly embellished full-body anime fantasy illustration of {argument name="character name" default="SOPHIE"}, a young elegant female alchemist-mage standing in the center of a vast celestial library laboratory. She has {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair in a soft short bob with a side ponytail and a large crystalline flower hair ornament, though her face is obscured by a flat pale square censor block. She wears an ornate white and icy-blue dress with silver filigree, corset lacing, layered ruffles, translucent trailing panels, detached flowing sleeves, gemstone pendants, thigh garter ornaments, and white high-heeled ankle boots with metallic trims. Two glowing blue potion bottles hang at her hip. Her pose is graceful and confident: one hand raised with a floating faceted blue crystal hovering above her palm, the other holding an open magic book that projects transparent holographic pages and arcane interface diagrams in neon blue. The environment is a grand circular observatory-like library with towering bookshelves, alchemical instruments, astrolabes, hanging ornaments, glassware, candles, and luminous magical symbols. A huge backlit arched window behind her casts cool heavenly light. The floor beneath her is covered in glowing concentric magic circles and reflections, surrounded by crystalline blue flowers and sparkling particles. The composition is vertical, centered, and extremely polished, with dense decorative detail, ethereal lighting, layered translucency, shimmering highlights, and a palette dominated by white, silver, sapphire, and pale violet. Include large decorative title text on the left reading {argument name="title text" default="SOPHIE"}, smaller Japanese text beneath reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="ソフィー"}, a small "CV:" line below, a short block of tiny English flavor text on the lower left, and a luminous blue hologram panel on the right with the word {argument name="panel text" default="SOPHIC"}. Make it feel like a luxurious character key visual or promotional poster for a magical science heroine, ultra-detailed, glossy, radiant, and intentionally over-the-top.
translatedPrompt: 一张高度装饰性的全身动漫奇幻插画，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="SOPHIE"}，一位年轻优雅的女性炼金术士兼法师，站在巨大的天体图书馆实验室中央。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} 的短发波波头，侧边扎着马尾，戴着巨大的水晶花发饰，但她的面部被一个平面的浅色方形遮挡块遮住。她身穿华丽的白蓝配色礼服，带有银色花丝、紧身胸衣系带、层叠荷叶边、半透明拖尾、分离式飘逸袖子、宝石吊坠、大腿袜带装饰，以及带有金属饰边的白色高跟短靴。腰间挂着两个发光的蓝色药水瓶。她的姿势优雅而自信：一只手抬起，掌心上方悬浮着一颗多面蓝色水晶，另一只手拿着一本打开的魔法书，投射出透明的全息书页和霓虹蓝色的奥术界面图。环境是一个宏伟的圆形天文台式图书馆，配有高耸的书架、炼金仪器、星盘、悬挂装饰品、玻璃器皿、蜡烛和发光的魔法符号。她身后巨大的背光拱形窗投射出清冷的天界光芒。脚下的地面覆盖着发光的同心魔法阵和倒影，周围环绕着晶莹的蓝色花朵和闪烁的微粒。构图为垂直居中，极其精致，具有密集的装饰细节、空灵的灯光、层叠的半透明感、闪烁的高光，色调以白色、银色、蓝宝石色和淡紫色为主。在左侧包含醒目的装饰性标题文本 {argument name="title text" default="SOPHIE"}，下方是较小的日文文本 {argument name="subtitle text" default="ソフィー"}，下方有一行小的“CV:”字样，左下角有一小段微小的英文风味文本，右侧有一个发光的蓝色全息面板，上面写着 {argument name="panel text" default="SOPHIC"}。使其呈现出奢华的角色主视觉图或魔法科学女主角宣传海报的感觉，超精细、光泽感强、光芒四射，且刻意追求极致华丽的效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: Sophie 华丽魔法海报：一张奢华的动漫风格角色海报，描绘了一位身处发光奥术图书馆中的白蓝配色炼金术士女主角，适用于奇幻游戏或轻小说的宣传艺术图。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
